display.purpose: Hero and section-level statements. Current family is a placeholder to replace.

body.purpose: Short explanatory copy and navigation support text.

label.purpose: Compact nav, metadata, and CTA labels.

components.name: Primary Hero Action
components.description: The main async action in the hero.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 42px; padding: 11px 17px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid #f1e8e1; background: #f1e8e1; color: #040302; font-family: Space Grotesk, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 650; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.22s ease, border-color 0.22s ease, color 0.22s ease, transform 0.22s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: transparent; color: #f1e8e1; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f1e8e1; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Secondary Hero Action
components.description: The quiet proof/sprint link beside the main action.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 42px; padding: 11px 17px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid rgba(241,232,225,0.28); background: rgba(241,232,225,0.04); color: #f1e8e1; font-family: Space Grotesk, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 650; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.22s ease, border-color 0.22s ease, transform 0.22s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(241,232,225,0.11); border-color: rgba(241,232,225,0.48); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f1e8e1; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Ruled Masthead Navigation
components.description: Split masthead with oversized VØID mark, compact links, and async CTA.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 28px; padding: 18px 24px; background: #040302; color: #f1e8e1; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(241,232,225,0.13); font-family: Space Grotesk, sans-serif; } .ds-nav strong { margin-right: auto; font-family: Instrument Serif, serif; font-size: 56px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 0.8; } .ds-nav span, .ds-nav a { font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: inherit; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav a { border: 1px solid #f1e8e1; border-radius: 999px; padding: 10px 16px; background: #f1e8e1; color: #040302; }

narrative.overview: Void is a restrained, cinematic brand surface for an async micro-studio. The page should feel like entering a quiet room where one luminous object is being examined: the offer, the proof project, the process.
keyCharacteristics: One strong visual event at a time.
Huge type, sparse copy, precise controls.
No sales-call pressure, no portfolio theater.

rules.name: The One Luminous Thing Rule
rules.body: Let the shader, one giant type moment, or one proof artifact dominate a fold. Do not make every component glow.

rules.name: The Type Must Do Work Rule
rules.body: If a section needs an icon grid or decorative badge to feel designed, the typography and spacing are not strong enough yet.

rules.name: The Flat Room Rule
rules.body: Surfaces do not float at rest. If something needs emphasis, use scale, space, contrast, or shader proximity before shadow.

dos: Do keep the dark gallery atmosphere while making the offer explicit.
Do use one proof artifact as the central evidence source.
Do make async delivery feel like a professional operating model.
donts: Don't build generic SaaS feature grids, hero metrics, pastel gradients, bento cards, or book a demo energy.
Don't fake portfolio depth with invented case studies or inflated client lists.
Don't hide the offer behind vague premium-studio mystery.
